_comment: HYDRA v4 Fault Injection Schedule — Standard Bench Test

params.pass_criteria: FSM reaches QUAD within 3s of each drop trigger, recovers to OCTO after recovery

_comment: T=10s: Simulate slow gradual payload consumption (ATE should lock by T=35s)

params.note: Still above threshold — ATE collecting baseline

_comment: T=50s: Payload release — rapid drop below ATE threshold

params.note: Expect MHDD trigger → PRE_DROP → QUAD within 2s

_comment: T=60s: Jerk spike during QUAD state — should NOT trigger re-enable

params.note: Jerk gate should block transition while spike is active

_comment: T=75s: New payload loaded — weight recovers above upper band
T=90s: Second payload drop — verify repeat cycle
T=110s: PixHawk heartbeat dropout — transitions should block

params.note: PixHawk interlock should block any FSM transitions during dropout

_comment: T=125s: Sensor failure — primary HX711 returns None

params.note: Arbitrator should fall back to secondary sensor

_comment: T=140s: Both sensors fail — pipeline should return None, FSM should hold

params.note: No FSM changes expected during total sensor blackout
System should stabilise back to OCTO with fresh ATE baseline
